name: Workaround has become normal
description: The team has normalized a workaround as part of everyday operation instead of treating it as temporary friction to remove.
source_ref: universal-signal-gold-set-01: workaround has become normal expressed through restaurant operating habits
evidence_types: staff describe a workaround as just how the venue works
temporary fixes have become the stable process
known friction is absorbed culturally instead of corrected
adapter_aliases: temporary fix is now the process
